시편 13:1.content: How long, Yahweh? Will you forget me forever? How long will you hide your face from me?

시편 13:2.content: How long shall I take counsel in my soul, having sorrow in my heart every day? How long shall my enemy triumph over me?

시편 13:3.content: Behold, and answer me, Yahweh, my God. Give light to my eyes, lest I sleep in death;

시편 13:4.content: lest my enemy say, “I have prevailed against him;” lest my adversaries rejoice when I fall.

시편 13:5.content: But I trust in your loving kindness. My heart rejoices in your salvation.

시편 13:6.content: I will sing to Yahweh, because he has been good to me.
